title: cryptantha ganderi
intro: Cryptantha ganderi, also known as Gander's cryptantha, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is a shrub-like perennial with small, blue to purple flowers that are rich in medicinal properties. The plant contains saponins and other compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, infections, and digestive problems. Cryptantha ganderi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its health benefits include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and promoting immune system function.
